full_text:
Dong Fu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Fu. Refused to help Yan Bin against rebels. Liu Yan had Dong Fu executed for cowardice. Dong Fu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Dong Fu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
